equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-08-19 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 22.05
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-08-19: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 22.05/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-08-19, the score printed 22.05/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
